attributes.Sql Query:

 (
 select ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS
 minus
 select ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID = STG_CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.REFRESH_DATETIME

CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.ATTRIBUTE29, CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.ATTRIBUTE30 
FROM
$$SRCDB.CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS)
AND ROWID IN (SELECT MAX(ROWID) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS GROUP BY ORGANIZATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME)
